purpose: Cross-link extracted catalogs, server seed data, runtime consumers, and client-facing wire builders. This is an inventory and provenance report; it does not promote suspect extraction data to canonical.

linkSemantics.canonical: Used by WorldSeedLoader/WorldCatalog or an authoritative wire response builder.
linkSemantics.derived: Generated from another catalog and retained for presentation, diagnostics, or geometry.
linkSemantics.extractionOnly: Extracted evidence with no runtime consumer found in the current server.
linkSemantics.unresolved: A link is suggested by naming or format, but no byte-level/runtime join is established.

datasets.provenance: CD/MsgDat/manual/reconstruction ledger; canonCol/canonRow are the strategic cell source.
unconsumedOrSuspect: planet records have no independent strategic cell

datasets.provenance: Named fortress catalog cross-linked to galaxy systems.
unconsumedOrSuspect: No independent fortress geometry/cell is present in MDX evidence

datasets.provenance: P3 procedural overlay; not original static CD data.
unconsumedOrSuspect: Must not be treated as canonical runtime economy without live/wire confirmation

datasets.provenance: Wire-oriented ship catalog plus derived stat presentation.
unconsumedOrSuspect: server/content/extracted/model-ship.json (273 visual records) is not a 1:1 gameplay stat source

datasets.provenance: Roster/stat seed with portrait and extracted-name cross-links.
unconsumedOrSuspect: all-names.characters count 133 exceeds canonical roster 99; remaining names need identity joins

datasets.provenance: Seed schemas with explicit wire-field metadata.
Initial deployment reconstruction; live-compatible full fleet table retained.
unconsumedOrSuspect: NPC deployment identity is reconstructed and requires live/wire confirmation

datasets.provenance: LOGH7 MDX/MDS scenegraph geometry and asset references.
unconsumedOrSuspect: MDX coordinates are visual-space data, not strategic gameplay cells
star_NN naming has no canonical system-name join

datasets.provenance: Derived strategic raster and adjacency data.
unconsumedOrSuspect: rasterStarCenters is diagnostic and has one extra/alternate center relative to the 85-system catalog
all-names ships 74 exceeds gameplay seed 63; identity mapping is incomplete

surfaceSummary.authoritativePlanetPosition: system cell plus orbit; no independent cell
surfaceSummary.tacticalPositionSource: wire 0x042f participant poses (shipId, heading, x, z, y)
surfaceSummary.tacticalCelestialPlacement: not supplied by MDX; 0x033b/0x0345/0x0347 are separate tactical object records

auditLimitations: This report inventories current source links; it does not claim unknown binary fields are decoded.
Extraction-only datasets require explicit provenance promotion before runtime use.
Reverse links that are only naming-based are listed as unresolved rather than canonical.
